# Engineering Charter — Execution Demo Fixture

## What this is
This is a canonical charter fixture used for `execution.demo.packet` request plumbing.

## How to use this charter
Use it as the charter truth for execution-demo packet tests.

## Rubric: 1–5 rigor levels
Keep the fixture deterministic.

## Project baseline posture
Baseline complete for demo coverage.

## Domains / areas (optional overrides)
None.

## Posture at a glance (quick scan)
Stable execution-demo fixture.

## Dimensions (details + guardrails)
Only fixture-backed execution demos are supported.

## Cross-cutting red lines (global non-negotiables)
- Keep trust boundaries intact.

## Exceptions / overrides process
- **Approvers:** fixture-owner
- **Record location:** docs/exceptions.md
- **Minimum required fields:**
  - what
  - why
  - scope
  - risk
  - owner
  - expiry_or_revisit_date

## Debt tracking expectations
Track changes with fixture updates.

## Decision Records (ADRs): how to use this charter
Not required for this fixture.

## Review & updates
Review when fixture semantics change.
